name: Chicken Breasts Southwestern
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except cheese in a bowl.
2. Add the mixture to a freezer bag and seal it.
3. Freeze the cheese slices separately.
4. When ready to cook, grill or broil the chicken breasts until cooked through.
5. Melt a piece of cheddar cheese on each chicken breast.
6. Serve with a tablespoon of salsa on top.
